summary: Iteration 13 testing completed successfully. All 12 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend verification confirmed the new Strategy Template Market feature is fully functional: templates API returns sorted list with all required fields, import endpoint increments counter and returns config, Import & Test button navigates to Replay tab with config loaded, PvP A/B buttons load configs into PvP Strategy inputs.
passed_tests: GET /api/social/templates returns list of strategy templates with all required fields (id, name, author, config, total_pnl, win_rate, score, imports)
GET /api/social/templates returns templates sorted by score descending
POST /api/social/templates/{id}/import increments imports counter and returns strategy config
Imported config can be used in replay simulation (integration test)
Frontend: Strategy Market section visible on Social tab (data-testid='strategy-market')
Frontend: Template cards display rank badge, name, author, description, config params, PnL, win rate, imports count
Frontend: Import & Test button (data-testid='import-replay-0') navigates to Replay tab with config loaded
Frontend: PvP A button (data-testid='import-pvp-a-0') loads config into PvP Strategy A inputs
Frontend: PvP B button (data-testid='import-pvp-b-0') loads config into PvP Strategy B inputs
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. Used existing test strategies from previous iterations.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 13 Strategy Template Market feature fully functional. New endpoints: GET /api/social/templates (returns top 30 strategies as templates sorted by score), POST /api/social/templates/{id}/import (increments imports counter, returns config). Frontend shows Strategy Market section on Social tab with 3 action buttons per template: Import & Test (navigates to Replay tab), PvP A (loads config into Strategy A), PvP B (loads config into Strategy B). All data-testid patterns: strategy-market, template-{idx}, import-replay-{idx}, import-pvp-a-{idx}, import-pvp-b-{idx}. Templates only show if config has min_confidence field.

mocked_apis.note: Trading Economics API and Tradovate API are mocked. All trading is simulated via PaperBroker.
